summary: Path Limits Player characters should experience the highlights

mechanics.name_guess: Path Limits Player characters should experience the highlights
mechanics.breadcrumb_path: Rules Compendium > Page 023 > npcs > Path Limits Player characters should experience the highlights
mechanics.excerpt: Path Limits Player characters should experience the highlights of their careers during game play: not while going through the Life Path Therefore , your character can follow limited number of paths before beginning play: Every character goes through one Early Childhood and one Late Childhood path_ After that; character can take up t0 six additional paths_ from any combination of the Higher Education and Real Life stages (as appropriate to his Or her affiliation ad the prerequisites of each path).
